title: Green Thumb Industries Reports Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2023 Results
text: Green Thumb Industries reported its fourth quarter and full year 2023 financial results. Annual revenue reached $1.1 billion, representing a 3.7% increase year-over-year. Net income totaled $36.3 million, or $0.15 per share. Adjusted EBITDA grew 5% to $326 million, comprising 31% of revenue. Operating cash flow surged 42% to $225 million. Cash reserves stood at $162 million at year-end. Total debt was $308.5 million. The company opened 15 new RISE Dispensaries throughout 2023, bringing its total to 91 locations across 14 states. Management invested over $200 million in capital expenditures to support future expansion. CEO Ben Kovler stated: We delivered strong full year 2023 cash flow from operations of $225 million—all the while investing over $200 million in capex to fuel future growth. Green Thumb repurchased $40 million of its own shares during 2023 and bought back $25 million of senior debt. The board subsequently authorized an additional $50 million share repurchase program in February 2024.
